rankings.title: IRP1 [4Fe-4S] Cluster Occupancy as Feeding-Entrained Iron-Redox Chronostat
rankings.key_strength: Highest groundedness; all claims verified; IRP2 KO separation test definitive; addressed all Cycle 1 criticisms
rankings.key_weakness: IRP1 contributes only 15-25% of IRE regulation; IRP2 dominates; distinction from JCI 2026 BMAL1→ATP7A→Cu pathway unclear

rankings.title: CISD2 [2Fe-2S] as Redox-Gated ER-Mitochondrial Calcium Timer (Forward Direction Only)
rankings.key_strength: Zero-publication novelty confirmed; forward-only parsimony; longevity × circadian × Fe-S triple intersection
rankings.key_weakness: CISD2 cluster stability vs redox sensitivity tension; redox midpoint confusion; effect size extrapolated from KO

rankings.title: CIA Pathway as LIP/ROS-Responsive Circadian Gate for Cytoplasmic Fe-S Proteome
rankings.key_strength: All literature verified; pathway-level scope affecting ~20 proteins; dual LIP+ROS input alignment
rankings.key_weakness: Acute perturbation evidence extrapolated to circadian; cytoplasmic LIP oscillation may be below CIAO3 threshold

rankings.title: Frataxin-Gated Fe-S Assembly via Mitochondrial LIP in FTMT-Negative Tissues
rankings.key_strength: FTMT tissue-specificity novel and verified; Lill 2025 stoichiometric amplification; FA carrier translational angle
rankings.key_weakness: Mitochondrial LIP oscillation purely speculative; 'unbuffered' overstated; FA carrier power optimistic

rankings.title: Conserved Fe-S Requirement in Clock Neurons — Drosophila to Mammalian SCN
rankings.key_strength: 14-year zero mammalian follow-up; reverse direction complementary; mouse genetic tools available
rankings.key_weakness: dCRY-specific confound; neurodegeneration vs specific clock disruption; Mandilaras primary was Fer2LCH

rankings.title: NADPH→FDXR→FDX2 Electron Supply Chain as Circadian Fe-S Assembly Gatekeeper
rankings.key_strength: FDX2:FXN stoichiometric sensitivity real (Lill 2025); non-linear amplification valid
rankings.key_weakness: NADPH arm quantitatively dead (FDXR Km=0.7µM, >99% saturated); double bottleneck collapsed to single arm

diversity_detail.H2.1: Post-translational mRNA regulation (IRP1 apo/holo → IRE binding)
diversity_detail.H2.3: ER-mitochondria Ca2+ signaling (CISD2 redox sensor at MAMs)
diversity_detail.H2.6: Cytoplasmic maturation pathway (CIA → CIAO3 → Fe-S proteome)
diversity_detail.H2.2: Substrate supply bottleneck (iron → frataxin, mitochondrial compartment)
diversity_detail.H2.7: Reverse direction / conservation (Fe-S → clock in neurons)

matchups.reason: Both arms intact vs one arm dead
FTMT argument novel; FA carrier angle

advancement.rationale: Top-3 average 6.98 exceeds 6.5 threshold. All 6 survivors advance to Quality Gate. Evolver skipped for Cycle 2.
